level_signals: 4+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations, or Customer Operations
Reports to VP of Revenue Operations
High-impact individual contributor role owning operational infrastructure

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations, or Customer Operations within a SaaS, professional services, or solutions delivery environment.
must_haves.qualifier: within SaaS, professional services, or solutions delivery environment

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven ability to design and implement cross-functional processes that drive measurable business outcomes.
Strong command of Salesforce or comparable customer management platforms, including reporting, workflow design, and data modeling.
Experience with capacity planning, forecasting, or resource modeling that connects demand signals to operational capacity.
An analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into insight—and insight into action.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to document complex processes and influence senior stakeholders.
Comfort operating in ambiguity and a bias toward building structure where it doesn't yet exist.
Experience with project management tools (e.g., Asana, Teamwork) and BI or reporting tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Domo, or similar)

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Understanding of services delivery, agency operations, or delivery-based business models; experience in the creator economy or marketing industry is a plus.

scope.surface: Revenue Operations infrastructure supporting Later's brand customers across Influence Platform, Managed Services, and Mavely
scope.business_model: SaaS platform + managed services / solutions delivery, B2B enterprise
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer health scores across product lines
core_responsibilities: Define and own operational frameworks ensuring sold revenue is delivered efficiently and effectively
Own metrics for campaign, customer, and portfolio delivery performance
Build and maintain reporting on campaign health, budget utilization, margin performance, and delivery risk
Build pipeline-to-capacity forecasting models with 30–60–90 day visibility
Design, document, and continuously improve customer operations workflows
Define SLAs, efficiency benchmarks, and operational standards
Own Salesforce data architecture for customer and campaign performance visibility
Create documentation and enablement resources for teams

green_flags: Clear reporting structure (VP of Revenue Operations)
Role sits at a strategic intersection of multiple business functions, offering broad impact
Company has notable enterprise clients (Nike, Wayfair, Unilever, Southwest Airlines)
red_flags: No mention of equity or bonus, which is atypical for a manager-level RevOps role at a growth-stage company
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed in the JD
Mavely is mentioned as a product area but not explained — scope may be broader or more complex than initially apparent
Role requires owning Salesforce data architecture without a dedicated systems/engineering team explicitly mentioned
